subject: General Awareness
question_text: What is the primary objective of the PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana launched by the Government of India?

options.text: Provide free LPG connections to rural households
Install rooftop solar panels to supply free electricity up to a limit
Subsidize electric vehicle purchases in urban areas
Provide irrigation support through solar pumps

solution.final_answer: Install rooftop solar panels to supply free electricity up to a limit

explanation.concept: The scheme focuses on decentralized solar energy adoption at the household level.
step_by_step: Identify scheme name: Surya Ghar implies solar-powered home.
Policy aim: reduce electricity bills and promote renewable energy.
Key feature: rooftop solar with free electricity up to specified units.

why_correct.B: Correct as it aligns with rooftop solar and free electricity objective

why_incorrect.C: EV subsidy relates to FAME scheme
why_incorrect.D: Solar pump schemes relate to PM-KUSUM

subject: General Awareness
question_text: Under the Ayushman Vay Vandana Yojana, which category of citizens is newly targeted for health insurance coverage?

options.text: Senior citizens aged 70 years and above

solution.final_answer: Senior citizens aged 70 years and above

explanation.concept: Extension of healthcare schemes to vulnerable elderly population.
step_by_step: Scheme extends ₹5 lakh coverage to seniors above 70.

why_correct.B: Correct as scheme specifically covers elderly 70+

why_incorrect.A: Child health is covered under other maternal-child schemes
why_incorrect.D: Gig workers are under separate social security frameworks

subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which ministry is the nodal agency for the implementation of the PM Vishwakarma Scheme?

options.text: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

explanation.concept: Traditional artisans and craftsmen fall under MSME ecosystem.

why_correct.B: Correct as MSME handles artisan support schemes

why_incorrect.C: Supports skilling, not primary scheme ownership
why_incorrect.D: Rural development is broader but not specific nodal body
